bead.title: agent: migrate internal helpers off RunOptions/CompareOptions/QuorumOptions
bead.description:
Stage 2 prereq for B22.

Migrate cli/internal/agent/ helpers off the three legacy options structs to AgentRunRuntime + ResolvedConfig.

In-scope (~10 files, all under cli/internal/agent/):
- virtual.go
- script.go
- claude_stream.go
- agent_runner.go
- models.go
- grade.go
- service_run.go
- session_index.go
- routing_metrics.go
- compare_adapter.go

Out-of-scope:
- cli/cmd/ migration (separate beads if needed; otherwise covered by previous Stage 2 work)
- Server-side migration (B22c)
- Final type deletion (B22)
- exec migration (B22b)

Each helper updates its public function signature. After this bead lands, only the type definitions in types.go remain referenced by ddx-side code (in test files and the type declarations themselves).
bead.acceptance: field RunOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/grade.go. field RunOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/service_run.go. field RunOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go. field CompareOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/grade.go. field QuorumOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/grade.go. cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... passes.
